questions.question: Where is Blue Harbor Coffee Roasters based and how do they source beans?
questions.feedback_text: Excellent summary with the right sourcing details.

questions.question: What are the subscription tiers and what do higher tiers include?
questions.feedback_text: Very helpful, this answer was specific and complete.

questions.question: Can customers pause subscriptions every week without limits?
questions.feedback_text: Incorrect. The policy allows a monthly pause, not unlimited weekly pauses.

questions.question: Does the support team refuse replacements for damaged deliveries?
questions.feedback_text: Wrong. Damaged shipments are replaced within forty-eight hours.
